author: pan4ratte
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Allows you to create complex word count presets that will be displayed in the status bar. Made with academic use cases in mind.

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## We're in the store now!🔥

First official release for Obsidian plugin store with some minor updates and fixes.

Find the plugin in the store: https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/advanced-word-count

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-advanced-word-count/compare/2.1.0...2.1.1

releases.author: pan4ratte

# What's new

* Full Russian translation of the plugin and README

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-advanced-word-count/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's new

### New features

* Now all counting metrics apply to selected text.
* Define metrics separator look by typing it in the plugin settings.

### UI enhancements

* From now, no message will appear in the status bar if there are no saved presets.
* Adjustments to ensure responsiveness, especially on mobile devices.

### UX enhancements

* Removed preset name display from the status bar for more clean look.
* Swapped toggle logic for citekeys advanced counting settings to ensure consistency.

### Other

* Locales update for consistency and clarity.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-advanced-word-count/compare/1.0.0...2.0.0
